QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_87

question.text: Under which lifecycle fund option are Government Model employees NOT eligible?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Government Model employees can choose only LC-25 (Conservative) or LC-50 (Moderate). LC-75 (Aggressive) is not available to them. **The Trap:** Since Govt Model caps equity at 15%, LC-75 (which starts at 75% equity) is incompatible with govt investment limits. **Cross-Exam Context:** Govt Model: LC-25 or LC-50 only, Active/Auto from Apr 2019. All Citizens/Corporate: LC-25, LC-50, LC-75 all available. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Explain to government employees that their conservative lifecycle options align with the government's mandate for pension fund safety.
